levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: A1 from zero
levels.description: Start speaking English from the first tiny patterns.

levels.title: A1 Core
levels.subtitle: Daily survival English
levels.description: Complete A1 Core with daily situations, simple past and future, polite requests, short messages, and real spoken output.

levels.title: A2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: A1 to A2 transition
levels.description: Bridge from short A1 sentences into connected A2 English: reasons, contrast, time clauses, past stories, plans, polite real-life tasks, and longer spoken answers.

levels.title: A2 Core
levels.subtitle: Strong practical A2
levels.description: A2 Core builds practical control: errands, services, work and study tasks, simple stories, short emails, opinions, listening repair, and one-minute spoken answers.

levels.title: B1 Bridge
levels.subtitle: A2 to B1 bridge
levels.description: B1 Bridge develops connected answers: stories, opinions, reasons, examples, polite repair, short writing, and practical spoken output.

levels.title: B1 Core
levels.subtitle: Balanced B1 English
levels.description: B1 Core builds real independent B1 ability: storytelling, opinions, conversation repair, practical writing, work and study communication, native-style input, natural grammar, and stronger spoken output.

levels.title: B2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: B1 to B2 bridge
levels.description: B2 Bridge develops abstract thinking, nuanced opinions, source reaction, argument structure, natural style, and longer independent spoken output.

levels.title: B2 Med
levels.subtitle: Middle B2
levels.description: B2 Med strengthens abstract discussion, source response, professional communication, precise style, revision, and independent spoken and written output.

levels.title: B2 Hi
levels.subtitle: High B2 independence
levels.description: B2 Hi develops high-B2 independence: layered argument, long-form speaking, deep native input, professional authority, precise style, complex social topics, and readiness for C1 Bridge.

levels.title: C1 Bridge
levels.subtitle: B2 to C1 bridge
levels.description: C1 Bridge develops conceptual thinking, source synthesis, discourse control, long-form speaking, analytical writing, and independent C1 learning habits.

levels.title: C1 Med
levels.subtitle: Middle C1 independence
levels.description: C1 Med develops sustained independent argument, sophisticated source synthesis, editorial revision, professional authority, complex social reasoning, and controlled advanced output.
